title: Lanjue 200 Paddle Bamboo Skewers 9CM, Flat Burgers Sticks, Kids Wooden Fruits Picks, Cocktail Sticks, Satay Skewers, Barbecue Kebabs
features: 【Natural Material】Our skewer sticks are made of natural wood,they are washable and reusable

【Package Content】Pack of 200 pieces short flat wooden sticks,each stick length is 9cm/3.5inch. Quantity Enough for your daily or party use.Warm Tip:The length of per stick is ,just close to that of an adult finger,please purchase after confirming the length,thanks

【Convenient to Use】The flat shape can better fix the ingredients on the bamboo stick and is not easy to slide.There is a 1cm width paddle shaped handle at the end of per stick, convenient for you to turn it over when barbecue
【Smooth 】These skewers sticks are repeated polished,they are smooth and no burrs,no need to worry about hurt your mouth when eating
【Various Uses】The wooden sticks can be used for barbecue, fruit, burger, sandwich, cocktail, cake, marshmallows, buffets party etc
description: Product Description 200PCS Bamboo Wooden Paddle Skewers, Healthy Safe and Reusable.
